'''Calamari Xinphar''' was a pink-colored [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage that originated from [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] homeworld. The drink was favored by [[Ibtisam]], a Mon Cal who flew [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]] with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] as an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 31|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 31]] {{1st}}
